_note: Cost Attribution adapter (Tru 1 Outer Harness). build-now-adapt-later: don gia token la AN SO — sua o day, engine khong bao gio hardcode. Don vi: USD tren 1 TRIEU token. Khop model bang substring (key nam trong ten model, vd 'opus' khop 'claude-opus-4-8').
_verify_how: Doi chieu bang gia provider hien hanh roi set _verified=true; key '_default' dung khi khong khop model nao.
